# Trakzi

> Trakzi is an all-in-one budgeting workspace for tracking income, expenses, savings, and shared costs.

## What is Trakzi?

Trakzi is a personal finance and budgeting application. Users can import bank transaction CSVs, scan grocery and retail receipts, and visualize their spending with AI-powered interactive charts. Trakzi also supports shared expense tracking with friends and roommates through collaborative rooms.

## Core Features

- **CSV Import**: Upload any CSV export from your bank or card provider. Trakzi normalizes the data and charts spending automatically.
- **Receipt Scanning**: Snap or upload grocery and retail receipts. Trakzi extracts totals for comparison against budgets and past habits.
- **AI-Powered Analytics**: An integrated AI assistant spots overspending patterns, answers natural language questions about your finances, and suggests budget adjustments.
- **Interactive Charts**: A rich collection of spending visualizations including heatmaps, category breakdowns, trend lines, and calendar views.
- **Shared Expenses & Rooms**: Create rooms with friends or roommates to track group expenses, split bills, and see balances at a glance.
- **Savings Tracking**: Set savings goals and monitor progress over time.
- **Challenges & Rankings**: Compete with friends on financial goals through score-based challenges and leaderboards.

## Target Audience

- Individuals wanting to track personal finances without connecting bank accounts directly (CSV-first approach).
- Roommates and friend groups who need to split shared expenses like rent, groceries, and bills.
- Budget-conscious users looking for AI-driven insights into their spending patterns.

## Technology

Trakzi is built with Next.js (React), uses Prisma with a PostgreSQL database, and is deployed on Vercel. Authentication is handled by Clerk. Analytics are powered by PostHog.

## Links

- Website: https://trakzi.com
- Sign Up: https://trakzi.com/sign-up
- Log In: https://trakzi.com/sign-in
